asciichat_mdns_service_t(3) Library Functions Manual asciichat_mdns_service_t(3)

NAME

asciichat_mdns_service_t - Service information for advertisement.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/mdns/mdns.h>

Data Fields


const char * name
uint16_t port
const char * type
const char * host
const char ** txt_records
size_t txt_count

Detailed Description

Service information for advertisement.

Definition at line 64 of file network/mdns/mdns.h.

Field Documentation

const char* asciichat_mdns_service_t::host

Host name with .local suffix (e.g., "myhost.local")
